# AEO Snapshot

> AEO Snapshot is a $149 AI Search Visibility Audit generator for websites that need to appear in ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and other AI answer surfaces.

Website: https://ilyayden.github.io/aeo-snapshot/
Sample report: https://ilyayden.github.io/aeo-snapshot/sample-audit.html
Telegram bot: https://t.me/AeoSnapshotBot?start=audit
Repository: https://github.com/IlyaYDen/aeo-snapshot

## What it does

- Scores AI answer readiness, citation gap, entity clarity, schema readiness, and llms.txt readiness.
- Generates a competitor comparison table and first 30-day priority fixes.
- Exports a PDF report and a sales email draft.
- Helps agencies and SEO consultants sell a one-time AI visibility diagnostic.

## Offer

The full audit costs $149 and includes:

- PDF report for one website.
- llms.txt draft.
- schema/entity/citation recommendations.
- first 10 priority fixes.
- partner-friendly white-label delivery format.

## Best fit

- SEO consultants.
- digital agencies.
- local service businesses.
- SaaS websites.
- founders worried about declining search clicks from AI answers.
